projectDescription: A Bitcoin-native inheritance protocol built on Stacks that lets vault owners lock sBTC and USDCx, designate heirs with percentage splits, and automatically release assets to beneficiaries if the owner's heartbeat signal stops.
keyFeatures: Heartbeat-based liveness detection — vault owner signs periodic transactions to keep vault locked
Multi-heir support — up to 10 beneficiaries with basis-point percentage splits
Multi-asset vaults — sBTC (Bitcoin-backed) and USDCx (dollar-stable) in a single vault
Configurable grace period — buffer time after missed heartbeat before assets become claimable
Guardian system — optional trusted address that can pause the countdown once during grace
Emergency withdrawal — owner retains full control and can reclaim all assets at any time
Updateable beneficiaries — heirs and splits can be changed while vault is active
Trustless and non-custodial — no lawyers, no custodians, no seed phrase sharing
Computed vault state — state derived from timestamps on every read, always current
React frontend with Leather/Xverse wallet support
